content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Fence". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/363/B
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of planks in the fence. The second line contains n integers, representing the length of each plank.
content.outputFormat: The minimum number of planks that need to be added to make the fence a multiple of the length of the shortest plank.

solution.approach: Find the length of the shortest plank, then calculate the total length of the fence. Divide the total length by the length of the shortest plank and round up to the nearest integer. Subtract the number of planks from this value to get the minimum number of planks that need to be added.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
planks = list(map(int, input().split()))
min_plank = min(planks)
total_length = sum(planks)
result = (total_length + min_plank - 1) // min_plank - n
print(result)
